features.name: Project status cards
features.description: Each QI project shown as a status card: name, phase (complete/in_progress/backlog/new/retired), open task count, link to kanban board

features.name: Claude usage strip
features.description: Today's token usage, spend, sessions, turns — plus 30-day cost total — shown at the top of every dashboard visit

features.name: Agent team table
features.description: All registered Claude agents with their status (active/idle), default model, and scope

features.name: Session log
features.description: Most recent QI Brain sessions shown in reverse order with summary
features.notes: From QI Brain API or status.json session_log fallback

features.name: Task column badges
features.description: Backlog / In Progress / Review / Done counts at a glance with links to board and health check

features.name: Service status per project
features.description: Each project's NSSM service is probed — running / stopped / not_found / n/a

features.name: Port open check
features.description: API port checked for each project — green tick / red cross per project

features.name: Git status
features.description: Branch name, last commit message (45 chars), uncommitted change count per project

features.name: Documentation currency
features.description: Docs marked current / stale / missing per project

features.name: Session summary presence
features.description: Whether a session summary docx exists for each project

features.name: Action items callout
features.description: Projects with health issues surfaced in a warning callout at the top of the Health page

features.name: Auto-refresh
features.description: Health page auto-reloads every 60 seconds

features.name: 4-column kanban
features.description: Backlog → In Progress → Review → Done. Drag cards between columns with SortableJS.
features.notes: Columns persist to tasks.json via PATCH /api/tasks/:id

features.name: Task cards
features.description: Each card shows title, description (first 80 chars), priority badge, agent icon, and project tag
features.notes: Agents: architect, builder, scout, scribe, ops, inspector, tester

features.name: Add task
features.description: New task form: title, description, project, agent, priority. Creates entry in tasks.json.

features.name: Delete task
features.description: Confirm-delete per card

features.name: Per-project filter
features.description: Filter the board to show only one project's tasks

features.name: Today's usage summary
features.description: Tokens, cost, sessions, and turns for the current day

features.name: 30-day daily chart
features.description: Daily token and cost breakdown for the past 30 days
features.notes: usage_stats.daily(30); Actual / Local offload / Local+Batch series

features.name: By project breakdown
features.description: Token usage and cost attributed per QI project

features.name: By model breakdown
features.description: Token usage, cost, and savings per Claude model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku)
features.notes: usage_stats.by_model(); per-model savings table; totals row

features.name: Tier comparison
features.description: Side-by-side comparison of usage tiers (Actual vs local offload scenarios)

features.name: Brain connection status
features.description: Live badge showing whether QI Brain (port 9010) is online or offline

features.name: Ecosystem stats
features.description: Active projects, decisions logged, features tracked, sessions logged — from Brain DB with local fallbacks
features.notes: Numbers: 9 projects / 57 decisions / 21 features / 80 sessions (as of 2026-04-19)

features.name: Agent profiles
features.description: Per-agent detail: status, model, scope, recent activity from Brain API

features.name: Recent sessions
features.description: Last N Brain-logged sessions across all projects

features.name: Elevation broker (QI_Elevate)
features.description: Any Claude session can restart, start, or stop NSSM services autonomously — no UAC prompt, no human in the loop
features.notes: from engine.common.qi_service import restart, start, stop

features.name: gsudo credential cache
features.description: One UAC prompt per workday (8-hour cache). After that, all elevation is silent.

features.name: Broker resilience
features.description: QI_Elevate auto-restarts on crash (NSSM AppExit=Restart). QI_ElevateWatchdog (Task Scheduler, SYSTEM, 1-min cadence) revives it if NSSM itself fails.
features.notes: Suicide-loop fix: stale-queue purge on startup for requests >5 min old

features.name: Single-instance PID lock
features.description: Broker locks C:\QIH\logs\elevation\broker.lock to prevent orphan-broker race condition on rapid restarts
